title: stack-popcount-parity
description: Implement C-parity for stack pop pipeline: stack__iter + ts_stack__add_slice semantics so ts_stack_pop_count behavior matches C (version-per-path grouping by base node). Include updates to internal/stack APIs and call sites. Acceptance: parity tests for multi-path GSS pop behavior and version ordering. REQUIRED DOC UPDATE: after completion, update docs/c-go-mismatches-checklist.md status entries for ts_stack_pop_count, stack__iter, ts_stack__add_slice, and related notes with commit reference.
